In My Own Words

The person
behind the
numbers

Certified Medical Assistant
B.B.A. — Business Administration
CPR Certified
Brooklyn, NY

"I got into this work because I genuinely love being the person who makes something scary feel manageable."

Dental treatment is a big decision — financially, emotionally, practically. Most patients walk into a consultation carrying more anxiety than excitement. My job, as I see it, is to flip that. I want every person who sits across from me to leave feeling like they've already made a friend in this practice.

Over three-plus years at a growing multi-specialty practice in Manhattan, I've grown from front desk into something closer to a systems architect. Across orthodontics, cosmetic dentistry, pediatrics, periodontics, endodontics, oral surgery, and implants — I've developed the fluency to guide patients through complex, high-value treatment plans with clarity and confidence. I noticed that good patient experiences were happening inconsistently — so I built the protocol to make them consistent. I wrote the documents. I trained the team. And then the production numbers moved.

I'm also pursuing my B.B.A. in Business Administration because I think about practices the way operators do: patient trust and financial health are not competing goals — they're the same goal, approached from different angles.

Invisalign CareCredit Cherry Financing Denticon PPO / OON Insurance iTero Scanner High-Value TX Plans Certified MA CPR Certified

Why Jalil Lewis

Six reasons I'm the
right hire

I've built the infrastructure, seen the results, and lived every step of the patient journey — from first phone call to case acceptance, across every specialty on the schedule.

01
🏗️
I build programs, not just follow them
I authored a comprehensive orthodontic consultation protocol from scratch — every team role, every handoff, every follow-up touchpoint. I didn't inherit a system. I created one. The same builder's mindset I've applied across all six specialties at my practice.
02
🤝
Multi-specialty fluency that converts
From explaining an Invisalign case to a 40-year-old exec, to walking a parent through their child's first extraction, to presenting a full-mouth implant plan — I've navigated high-stakes conversations across every specialty on the schedule. I don't hand off. I guide.
03
💡
Deep insurance & financing fluency
Major PPO plans in-network and OON, pre-authorizations across specialties, and patient financing through CareCredit and Cherry. I translate complexity into clarity so patients feel empowered, not overwhelmed — and case acceptance follows.
04
📈
My work shows up in the numbers
A consistent 75% case acceptance rate across orthodontics and cosmetics. Since implementing my protocol in Q4 2024: receipts jumped from 20 to 115 YTD, adult cases grew 39% year-over-year, and total CCAs increased by 32 — all confirmed by third-party production data.
05
🎓
Clinical credibility + business acumen
A Certified Medical Assistant with CPR certification and an active B.B.A. in Business Administration. Clinical grounding and operational thinking — a rare combination at the front desk that lets me speak the language of both the doctor and the patient.
06
🌱
I raise the people around me
I've trained and mentored front-office staff, developed practice-wide onboarding guides, and built workflow standards from scratch across a team supporting 5 specialties and 14 operatories. I don't just perform well — I build teams that do.
Orthodontic Program · Production Data · Q4 2024 – Present

The numbers tell
the story

Data provided by the Align Technology territory representative. Protocol implemented Q4 2024. These figures reflect the direct impact of a system Jalil built from the ground up — applied within a thriving multi-specialty environment.

Before · Early 2024

Strong clinical team, inconsistent front-office outcomes

The practice had exceptional providers across multiple specialties but no standardized consultation framework for orthodontics. Patient experience depended on who was working that day. Orthodontic receipts sat at 20 YTD in the prior period. Great people, no unified system.

The Shift · Q4 2024

Protocol built. Team trained. System live.

Jalil wrote the full Orthodontic Success Protocol — every touchpoint from first phone call to same-day follow-up email. The team was trained, standards were set, and cross-specialty coordination improved. Q4 2024 became the inflection point.

After · YTD Results

Sustained growth, not a one-time spike

High case volume held through Q1 and Q2 2025. Adult cases — historically harder to convert — grew 39% year-over-year. The system created the consistency the practice never had, and the same framework is replicable across any specialty in any practice.

* YTD figures reflect data shared by the Align Technology territory representative mid-cycle. Q4 2025 figures are partial and expected to increase at year-end close.

Growth you can
see and explain

The chart below reflects real data sourced directly from the Align Technology territory dashboard. Before Q4 2024, the practice had no unified ortho protocol. Receipts YTD

The most direct measure of production. Went from 20 in the prior period to 115 YTD — a 475% increase driven entirely by a new patient experience system.

↑ +32 vs. prior year · +53%
CCA volume rose 53% year-over-year, sustained across Q1 and Q2 2025 — not a one-time spike. The protocol created a repeatable conversion engine.
Adult Cases YTD
71
↑ +39% year-over-year growth
Adult patients are the hardest to convert — higher stakes, more hesitation. A 39% YOY jump in adult cases reflects trust built at the consultation table, one conversation at a time.
Real Patient Case · December 2024

My protocol,
in real life

This is an actual follow-up email sent the same day as a consultation. Personalized, transparent, and action-oriented — this is what moved the numbers.

The Situation

Patient came in for an orthodontic consultation but also needed wisdom teeth extracted before treatment could begin. Most coordinators would have left it there and waited. I called the oral surgeon's office that same day, identified available dates, and included them in the follow-up email.

What I Did

Sent a full treatment breakdown with fees, insurance coverage, and pay-in-full discount — along with a time-sensitive promotion. I also attached the patient's panoramic X-ray so they could proceed directly to the oral surgeon without returning to our office first.

"The patient doesn't need to follow up with us — we already followed up with them."
Why It Matters

This is the standard I hold for every consultation. Every detail handled. Every barrier removed. That's the difference between a treatment coordinator and a treatment advocate. One processes. The other clears the path.

Orthodontic Consultation Follow-Up

This is Jalil — I want to be here every step of the way to answer any questions you may have. Once you decide to start, your custom aligners will take about 3–4 weeks to arrive.

Treatment Fee: $6,800

Estimated Insurance Coverage: $2,500

In full with 5% Discount: $6,460

I already called Tribeca Oral Surgery and have appointment options ready for you. I've also attached your panoramic X-ray — the oral surgeon will need it and you won't need to return to our office first.

Ask me how to maximize your insurance benefits!

Treatment Planning Philosophy

How I work with
every patient

Five steps I take with every consultation — this is the protocol I wrote, across every specialty, and what drove the results.

1
Start human — before finances, start a conversation
I open every consultation by building genuine rapport before anything clinical. People accept care from people they trust — so trust comes first, regardless of specialty.
2
Discover their "why" — understand the motivation
I always ask what brought them in. Their answer — confidence, pain, a deadline, years of avoidance — becomes the anchor for the entire conversation and the treatment I present.
3
Present with transparency — no confusion, no pressure
I walk through the financial agreement line by line — insurance reimbursement, pay-in-full discounts, financing options. Patients leave informed, not overwhelmed. Clarity converts.
4
Close with confidence — always offer same-day
When the doctor confirms the plan and the patient is motivated, I always offer same-day treatment starts. Momentum matters — and I've built a system that captures it.
5
Follow up the same day — every single time
Every consultation gets a personalized recap email before end of day — treatment breakdown, scan images, and something personal from our conversation. Every time. No exceptions.
